name: w8a-packaging
title: W8a packaging: pip/pipx installable + README quickstart
description: S1 of the paradigm-onboarding epic (06-21-canonical-layout). Make codas pip/pipx-installable for cross-repo use: broaden requires-python to >=3.9 (verified: 563-test suite passes on 3.9, no match/case, no runtime unions), add a README install quickstart (pipx/pip install -> codas init -> codas hooks --install; PYTHONPATH=src is source-checkout/dogfood only). Pure packaging, NOT gate-adjacent. Verify pip install -e . on python3.9 + console script runs; check 0; byte-identical; suite green.
creator: oydodo
